title: Magma mod
description: A fiery expansion adding magma ore, ingots, and a complete set of powerful magma tools to your world.
body:
Magma Mod introduces new volcanic resources to your Minecraft experience. Venture into the depths to discover Magma Ore, refine it into pure Magma Ingots, and forge a complete arsenal of heat-infused equipment.

Features:
Magma Ore: A rare new mineral found in the deep underground layers.

Magma Ingots: High-temperature materials used for crafting advanced gear.

Complete Toolset: Includes Magma Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

Enhanced Stats: These tools offer high durability and efficiency, powered by the core of the earth.

Upgrade your mining and combat capabilities with the raw power of molten magma!




CurseForge: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magma-mod
